1.description: Phase 1 (Decomposition). Single batched LLM call that takes catalog item template + request variables and produces a concrete task DAG with owner assignment per node, dependencies, SLA estimate per task, and overall timeline. Goes through the LLM gateway with policy composer; output is schema-validated. Source of the materialised plan persisted to itsm.request_item.plan.

parameters.name: ritm_id
parameters.description: RITM id this decomposition is for.

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: Form values supplied by the requester.
